nasb.text: that mighty kings have ruled over Jerusalem, governing all the provinces beyond the River, and that tribute, custom and toll were paid to them.

esv.text: And mighty kings have been over Jerusalem, who ruled over the whole province Beyond the River, to whom tribute, custom, and toll were paid.

cnv.text: 從前大能的君王統治耶路撒冷，治理河西那邊的全地，接受他們繳稅、進貢和納糧。

ccb.text: 强大的君王曾经统管耶路撒冷和幼发拉底河西全境，并向人们征收贡物和赋税。
